title: Internals: Add IEEE 4-state type checks (Issue #3645 partial)
body:
## Summary

Step 1 of Issue #3645. Add IEEE 1800-2023 type checks for 2-state vs 4-state assignment compatibility:

- Add V3Width check for unpacked array assignments between 2-state and 4-state element types (IEEE 1800-2023 6.22.2, 7.6)
- Fix foreach loop variable type to use 2-state `int` per IEEE 1800-2023 12.7.3 (was using 4-state `integer`)

## Notes

- Uses existing `isFourstate()` bool on AstNodeDType - no new enum needed

## Test plan

- [x] `t_fourstate_assign.v` - valid same-state array assignments
- [x] `t_fourstate_assign_bad.v` - error on 4-state to 2-state array assignment
- [x] Existing foreach tests pass (`t_foreach.py`, `t_foreach_array.py`)
- [x] [CI passes on fork](https://github.com/10U-Labs-LLC/verilator/actions/runs/20880682238)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
